fundamentals.long_business_summary: Rajnandini Fashion India Limited engages in the design, manufacturing and sale of women's apparel. The company offers ethnic wear, including ethnic sets, kurtas, kurta sets with dupattas, patiala salwar suits, unstitched dress materials, sarees, tops, such as cotton tops, crop tops, tunics, and western tops, dresses, such as mini dresses, long dresses, maternity dresses, co-ord sets, plus-size apparel, and a Rajnandini exclusive collection under the brand names Merira, Monira, Roly Poly, and Rajnandini. The company caters to individual consumers and business partners, serving B2C customers through its own website and e-commerce platforms, such as Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Ajio, LimeRoad, and Nykaa, and direct-to-consumer sales across India; and under the B2B segment, it supplies unstitched and semi-stitched fabrics as well as ready-to-wear garments to channel partners and garment processors through wholesale and direct distribution channels. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Surat, India.
